{{Infobox character
| name = Fisher Gesha
| aliases = Gesha
| appears_in = Cradle
| titles = Soulsmith, Fisher, Highgold Soulsmith, elder, Highgold
| abilities = sacred artist, purple madra to pull heavy doors shut, purple madra to manipulate objects, throw a web of purple light, purple madra to lash lines to debris
| affiliations = Fisher sect
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

''See also: [[Fisher Gesha Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Fisher]] Gesha, also known as Gesha, is a [[Highgold]] [[Soulsmith]] originally from the [[Desolate Wilds]]. A tiny, extremely wrinkled woman with gray hair styled in a tight bun, she is often seen using a mechanical [[drudge]] consisting of eight purple spider-like legs that extend from beneath her robes to lift her or transport her. She carries a large goldsteel hook on her back that functions like a sickle and is skilled in the art of creating and working with bindings. Throughout her career, she has served as a mentor to [[Lindon]], overseeing his training and helping him refine his [[madra]] control. Her expertise extends to constructing mobile foundries and complex devices, such as cannons and boundary fields. Despite her irritable and disapproving demeanor, she is deeply devoted to her family, eventually establishing a [[Soulsmith]] shop in [[Stormrock]]. She has been recognized for her distinguished service to the [[Empire]], receiving rewards that elevated her status toward [[Truegold]].}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Fisher]] Gesha is a [[Highgold]] [[Soulsmith]] and an elder who possesses a soft heart. While working in the foundry, she utilizes a curved goldsteel blade and a goldsteel hook alongside various spider constructs. For nearly two weeks, she oversaw [[Lindon]], whom she referred to as Wei Shi [[Lindon]], and expressed disappointment regarding his inability to forge. Gesha's unique physiology includes mechanical spider legs in place of feet, which allow her to drift. During the events at the foundry, one of her spider constructs was responsible for attacking [[Yerin]].}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Fisher Gesha]] is a [[Soulsmith]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9">''Soulsmith'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Gesha is a [[Soulsmith]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Gesha has a soft heart.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Gesha possesses a curved goldsteel blade.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c10">''Soulsmith'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Gesha has a [[drudge]] with spider legs.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Gesha works in the foundry.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c11">''Soulsmith'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Gesha is disappointed in [[Lindon]]'s failure to forge.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Fisher Gesha]] is a character who uses a goldsteel hook and has mechanical spider legs.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c12">''Soulsmith'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Fisher Gesha]] refers to [[Lindon]] as Wei Shi [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Gesha is a [[Fisher]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Fisher Gesha]] has spider constructs.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13">''Soulsmith'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] has been under [[Fisher Gesha]] for almost two weeks.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Fisher Gesha]] has spider legs where her feet should be.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c13" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Fisher Gesha]] refers to the scripted iron barrels as mining equipment.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c14">''Soulsmith'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Fisher Gesha]] is a person [[Lindon]] took a pack from.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c17">''Soulsmith'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Fisher Gesha]] is an elder who can drift on spider's legs.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19">''Soulsmith'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|Gesha is a [[Highgold]] [[Soulsmith]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c19" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The spider that attacked [[Yerin]] was one of Gesha's constructs.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c20">''Soulsmith'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Fisher]] Gesha is a [[Highgold]] [[sacred artist]] and member of the [[Fisher sect]] who possesses gray hair and eight mechanical [[Forged]] legs. This four-foot-tall old woman, who moves using a [[drudge]] and speaks with a raspy voice, operates her own foundry. As a [[Soulsmith]], she tutored [[Lindon]] and examined the constructs of the [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] alongside him and [[Eithan]]. During her training sessions, she utilized dummies for practical experience and wielded a goldsteel-plated fishhook as a weapon. Her [[madra]], which can be purple in color, allows her to pull objects together, such as when she used it to shut heavy doors.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Fisher Gesha]] is a [[sacred artist]] with gray hair and eight legs of mechanical [[Forged madra]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1">''Blackflame'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Gesha is a [[Fisher]] and a [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Gesha is a [[Highgold]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Fisher Gesha]] is a member of the [[Fisher sect]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Fisher Gesha]]'s [[madra]] pulls objects together.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Fisher Gesha]] uses a goldsteel-plated fishhook as a weapon.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c1" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Fisher Gesha]] is a character [[Lindon]] stays near in the woods.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2">''Blackflame'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Fisher Gesha]] is a four-foot-tall old woman.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c2" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Fisher Gesha]] has a foundry.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c3">''Blackflame'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Fisher Gesha]] uses a [[drudge]] to move.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5">''Blackflame'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Gesha's voice has an extra rasp.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Gesha looked at the [[scripts]] and constructs of the [[Thousand-Mile Cloud]] with [[Eithan]] and [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6">''Blackflame'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Fisher Gesha]] is a [[Soulsmith]] who tutors [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Fisher Gesha]] is a person who was woken by [[Cassias]]' shouts.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7">''Blackflame'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Fisher Gesha]] uses dummies for practical experience.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Lindon]] forged scales for [[Fisher Gesha]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10">''Blackflame'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Fisher Gesha]] is a person who has not noticed [[Lindon]] feeding his pet [[Sylvan]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Gesha used purple madra to pull heavy doors shut.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c17">''Blackflame'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Fisher]] Gesha is a [[Highgold]] [[Soulsmith]] from the [[Desolate Wilds]] who possesses gray hair and long purple spider legs as part of her [[drudge]]. Brought by [[Eithan]] for her unique talents, she assisted [[Lindon]] in his preparations for a duel and noted that he had trained intensely for an entire year. While setting up a camp using [[Remnant]] parts, she utilized her purple madra to manipulate objects, lash lines to debris, and throw webs of light. After following [[Renfei]], she was assigned to an apprentice room in the foundry alongside [[Lindon]], a person she has traveled with previously, where she makes use of a hook.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Fisher Gesha]] is a [[Highgold]] [[Soulsmith]] from the [[Desolate Wilds]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3">''Skysworn'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Fisher Gesha]] has long purple spider legs as part of her [[drudge]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Fisher Gesha]] helped prepare [[Lindon]] for the duel.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c3" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Fisher Gesha]] has gray hair.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7">''Skysworn'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|Gesha uses purple madra to manipulate objects.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Fisher Gesha]] noted that [[Lindon]] has trained like a madman for a year.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Fisher Gesha]] is being brought by [[Eithan]] for her unique talents.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8">''Skysworn'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Fisher Gesha]] has set up a camp with [[Remnant]] parts.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Fisher Gesha]] can throw a web of purple light.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9">''Skysworn'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Fisher Gesha]] uses purple madra to lash lines to debris.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c9" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Fisher Gesha]] follows [[Renfei]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c10">''Skysworn'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Fisher Gesha]] and [[Lindon]] were assigned to an apprentice room in the foundry.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12">''Skysworn'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Fisher Gesha]] uses a hook.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Fisher Gesha]] is a person [[Lindon]] has traveled with.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c12" />}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Fisher]] Gesha is a shrunken old woman characterized by her gray hair, which she wears tied up in a bun. During her work, she uses a ring to tap against the metal of a cannon and observes that the [[Song of Falling Ash]] [[binding]] is nearly falling apart. Having developed plans for a compound launcher construct, she advises that such constructs should be extracted and rebuilt piece by piece.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Fisher Gesha]] is a shrunken old woman with gray hair tied up into a bun.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7">''Ghostwater'', chapter 7</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Fisher Gesha]] is a character who uses a ring to tap on the metal of a cannon.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Gesha is a character who developed plans for a compound launcher construct.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|Gesha noted that the [[Song of Falling Ash]] [[binding]] was nearly falling apart.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c7" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Fisher Gesha]] is a person who would advise extracting and rebuilding constructs piece by piece.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c8">''Ghostwater'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|A business owner and dreadbeast hunter of the [[Desolate Wilds]], the wrinkled-faced [[Fisher]] Gesha initially hosted a group for a meal prepared for her family. While studying [[Skysworn armor]] alongside [[Lindon]], she utilized her [[Truegold]]-level strength and [[Forged madra]] to facilitate the setup of a new barn. This structure eventually became a mobile [[Soulsmith foundry]], featuring massive purple spider legs that allowed the vessel to roam throughout the [[Blackflame]] camp.}}

{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Fisher Gesha]] is cooking for her family and has invited the group over.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Fisher Gesha]] is studying [[Skysworn armor]] with [[Lindon]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6">''Underlord'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Fisher Gesha]] has the strength of a [[Truegold]] and possesses purple spider-legs of [[Forged madra]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8">''Underlord'', chapter 8</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Fisher Gesha]] has a barn being set up.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Fisher Gesha]] is a business owner.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Fisher Gesha]] constructed a mobile [[Soulsmith foundry]] in the form of a barn with massive purple spider legs.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14">''Underlord'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Fisher Gesha]]'s mobile [[Soulsmith foundry]] roamed the [[Blackflame]] camp.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Gesha is a person with a wrinkled face.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Gesha is a hunter of [[dreadbeasts]] in the [[Desolate Wilds]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c14" />}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] once studied old notes with [[Fisher Gesha]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Fisher Gesha]] is a [[Sage]] who offered her [[life]] to atone for her actions.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21">''Dreadgod'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Fisher Gesha]] reacted poorly to being summoned.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Fisher Gesha]] has [[Soulsmithing]] facilities in tunnels.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|Gesha asked [[Seisha]] to work on a welcoming display for the [[Seven-Year Festival]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32">''Waybound'', chapter 32</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|Lindon let out a sigh of relief. “Of course,” Lindon said, thinking of the scales he had Forged for Fisher Gesha.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c10" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|“Underlord or no Underlord, if you’re walking into my place of business and telling me to clear out—”<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c8" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|“I have said so many insolent things to the Sage, hmm?” Fisher Gesha said. “This old woman can only atone for her actions, and protect her family, by offering her life.”<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c21" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“I just wanted your permission to use the Soulsmithing facilities in those tunnels!<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|“Gesha asked me to work on the welcoming display for the Seven-Year Festival next year,” Seisha said.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c32" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Soulsmiths]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Sacred artists]]
